events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes EMT bending & installation at a heavy-industrial site. The stage is "rough-complete" - roughed in but not yet closed out. The progress photos show the current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint being scored. No defects or hazards are mentioned. Reference material is NEC Art. 358 and Ch. 9 (fill).

Since the checkpoint scope is finished and no defects are described, this should be a pass. The work is rough-complete, percent complete would be high (maybe 90-95% since cleanup/labeling remains but those are outside the checkpoint). No component conditions flagged. Risk is low. Confidence is reasonably high since the scenario clearly states the scope is finished.
